\tzpentry{ID5661}{Magnetic Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5661 introduces Magnetic Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \mathbf{B}_{\mathrm{dip}}(\mathbf{r};\boldsymbol{\mu},\mathbf{r}_0) = \frac{\mu_0}{4\pi}\Bigg[\frac{3(\mathbf{r}-\mathbf{r}_0)\bigl(\boldsymbol{\mu}\cdot(\mathbf{r}-\mathbf{r}_0)\bigr)}{|\mathbf{r}-\mathbf{r}_0|^5} -\frac{\boldsymbol{\mu}}{|\mathbf{r}-\mathbf{r}_0|^3}\Bigg]\,. \]
